assessment.integrityNote: This is a graded assessment, so Sentinel confirms it's really you. Everything runs on your device — only an integrity score is kept.
assessment.passedNote: You earned a verified credential — your confidence in this skill just went up.
assessment.retryNote: Review the material and try again — you get a fresh set of questions each time.
assessment.selectAll: Select all correct answers. You need {percent}% to pass.

player.noFileAttached: No file attached to this yet.
player.notFoundBody: The course may have been removed or is unavailable.
player.getCredentialTitle: Course complete — get your completion credential.
player.whyMonitoringLabel: Why the integrity check is on
player.whyMonitoringBody: This is a graded assessment, so Sentinel confirms it's you doing the work — that's what makes the credential you earn trustworthy to others.
player.privacyBody: Everything runs on your device. No video, audio, or images are ever recorded, stored, or sent anywhere — only an integrity score. The camera is optional and you can turn it off at any time.
player.noElementBody: Pick a lesson from the list to start learning.
player.reducedConfidenceNoCamera: Camera off — skills earned here will carry lower confidence.
